title: Sharpe, Andrew - Parliamentary Under Secretary, Home Office - ACOBA Advice
body: "Lord Sharpe left his role at the Home Office in July 2024  Non-Executive Director, Battenhall Limited Lord Sharpe sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Battenhall Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Chairman of the Board, Smarti Environmental Ltd Lord Sharpe sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Smarti Environmental Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025; and the appointment was taken up in September 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Adviser, Primary Access and Research Ltd Lord Sharpe sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Primary Research and Access. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025; and the appointment was taken up in May 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Non-Executive Director,  Africa House London  Lord Sharpe sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Africa House London. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
